testcase.name: Authentication Flow › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect to /auth when accessing protected routes
Authentication Flow › Auth Page Rendering › should display the auth page with correct title and description
Authentication Flow › Auth Page Rendering › should show Google sign-in button
Authentication Flow › Auth Page Rendering › should have both sign-in and sign-up tabs
Authentication Flow › Auth Page Rendering › should switch to sign-up tab and show different form
Authentication Flow › Auth Page Rendering › should show email/password form by default
Authentication Flow › Form Validation › should show validation error for empty form submission
Authentication Flow › Form Validation › should show validation error for invalid email
Authentication Flow › Form Validation › should show validation error for short password
Authentication Flow › Form Validation › should show signup validation for short password on signup tab
Authentication Flow › Form Validation › should show error for wrong credentials
Authentication Flow › Login Flow › should successfully log in with valid credentials
Authentication Flow › Login Flow › should show user email in header after login
Authentication Flow › Logout Flow › should log out successfully
Clients Page › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect to auth when not logged in
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should display the clients page heading
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should have search input for filtering clients
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should show clients tab and estimation tab
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should have new client button
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should filter clients when searching
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should open new client dialog when clicking Nouveau client
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should have toggle hidden clients button
Clients Page › Authenticated Access › should navigate to estimation tab
Navigation & Routing › Public Routes › auth page should load without redirect
Navigation & Routing › Public Routes › unauthorized page should load
Navigation & Routing › Public Routes › unsubscribe page should load
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /dashboard (root) to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /clients to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /jobs to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /calendar to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /invoices to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /finance to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /employees to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /reminders to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /settings to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /analytics to auth
Navigation & Routing › Protected Routes Redirect › should redirect /messagerie to auth
Navigation & Routing › Authenticated Navigation › should navigate to all protected pages successfully
